info.name: Workday Integration Workday Financial Management API
Workday Integration Retrieve a collection of customers

params.name: limit
params.description: The maximum number of objects in a single response (default 20, maximum 100)

params.name: offset
params.description: The zero-based index of the first object in a response collection

params.name: search
params.description: Search string used to filter results

items.docs: Returns a collection of customer records used in accounts receivable and revenue management.

info.name: Workday Integration Retrieve a specific customer

params.name: ID
params.description: The Workday ID of the resource

items.docs: Returns the specified customer instance including contact information and account details.

info.name: Workday Integration Retrieve activities for a customer

params.name: ID
params.description: The Workday ID of the resource

params.name: limit
params.description: The maximum number of objects in a single response (default 20, maximum 100)

params.name: offset
params.description: The zero-based index of the first object in a response collection

items.docs: Returns the activity records associated with the specified customer.

info.name: Workday Integration Retrieve a collection of suppliers

params.name: limit
params.description: The maximum number of objects in a single response (default 20, maximum 100)

params.name: offset
params.description: The zero-based index of the first object in a response collection

params.name: search
params.description: Search string used to filter results

items.docs: Returns a collection of supplier records used in accounts payable and procurement operations.

info.name: Workday Integration Retrieve a specific supplier

params.name: ID
params.description: The Workday ID of the resource

items.docs: Returns the specified supplier instance including contact information and payment terms.

info.name: Workday Integration Validate worktags for financial transactions

items.docs: Validates a set of worktags for use in financial transactions, ensuring they are compatible and active.
